Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Continued To Aug-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for Thomas Lucas.

Ms. Fox stated that there was a miscommunication between the Probate Examiner and her office. Status on the accounting was continued to August 19, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Continued To Jul-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Trustee failed the file an accounting. The future accounting was continued to July 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
